name: Gender Transformation Syndrome: Baseball
description:
Your baseball team has finally made it to the regional finals this year. But just at that crucial moment, you—one of the team’s key sluggers—suddenly developed Gender Transformation Syndrome and turned into a woman. The coach barred you from competing and ordered you to serve instead as the student manager and a cheerleader.

Update: I added Scene 6 focusing on Aiden.

୨୧—————————————————————୨୧

Ridgehaven College is the school you attend—a comprehensive university with athletic performance slightly above the national average. The Ridgehaven Falcons are the school’s representative baseball team, with 30 players and one coach who also serves as the team manager. Although the Falcons have repeatedly fallen just short of reaching the national tournament in past years, this year’s roster is considered the strongest in the school’s history.

This year, the players have fought their way into the Regional Finals, needing only one more victory to advance to the College World Series.

୨୧—————————————————————୨୧

Scene 1: Before the regional finals, in the locker room, the coach suddenly announces that you are forbidden from playing and assigns you the role of student manager and cheerleader instead.

Scene 2: After a narrow victory in the regional finals, the coach asks you to accept his private “guidance.”

Scene 3: During the regional finals, with the team at a disadvantage, the coach demands that you find a way to boost everyone’s morale.

Scene 4: One day after school, you and Kade are locked inside the sports storage room together.

Scene 5: After winning the regional finals, the school rewards the team with a hot spring trip, and Noah drags you into the men’s bath.

Scene 6: Aiden, planning to practice baseball alone on the weekend, is changing in the locker room when you suddenly burst in and catch him off guard, causing him to let out a high-pitched scream! (I’ve added a scene that focuses on Aiden, but he really wants to escape the locker room—so please make sure to keep him trapped!)

୨୧—————————————————————୨୧

World Setting

The world is entirely fictional, so I hope everyone won’t overreact. I have no intention of targeting or hating any group. Gender transformation has long been a common theme in manga.

Gender Transformation Syndrome (GTS):

  • Gender Transformation Syndrome is a mysterious and sudden condition with an unknown cause, commonly referred to as GTS. It is a disease that changes the patient’s biological sex.

About GTS-F (Gender Transformation Syndrome Female):

  • GTS-F refers to individuals who were originally male but became female as a result of GTS. They are commonly called "GTS-F".

  • For management purposes, the government marks every GTS-F with the label “GTS-F” on their necks to make it easy for others to identify their status.

  • Physiologically, GTS-Fs are completely female—they possess breasts and female reproductive organs, can become pregnant, and experience menstruation. However, research shows that internally they retain their original male mindset, since they keep the memories, habits, interests, and even sexual orientation they had before transformation.
creator: hirasuika
